title: Atmospheric optimized
description: Improve the optimization and performance of Minecraft with one modpack without unnecessary mods
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a697434e9eb67791cb5a6a4dc47908cb72cfb230.png)

# advantages of modpack

### Actual

This modpack contains only current mods and the modpack itself is updated quickly to new versions

### Always works

This modpack does not contain mods that change the game so if you install a lot of mods it will work

### Available for Forge

This modpack is also available on Forge.

# answers on questions

- F: I found a bug in the modpack, what should I do?
- C: Write to our discord channel and I will solve this problem.

- F: What mods are in this modpack?
- C: Click on any version of the modpack and scroll down a little there will be the entire list of mods and resource packs

- F: I want to offer you a mod for the modpack how to do it
- C: Write to me in a [telegram](https://t.me/smailexxxxxx) and we’ll think about it
